languages.text: "Ничего". {n}Капитан отвечает сухо и лаконично.{/n} "Мне не известна ни их численность, ни возможное время прибытия".
"Nothing." {n}The captain replies dryly and succinctly.{/n} "I don't know their numbers or their possible time of arrival."
languages.original_text: "Ничего". {n}Капитан отвечает сухо и лаконично.{/n} "Мне не известна ни их численность, ни возможное время прибытия".

traits.locale_text: "Nothing." {n}The captain replies dryly and succinctly.{/n} "I don't know their numbers or their possible time of arrival."
"Nothing." {n}The captain replies dryly and succinctly.{/n} "I don't know their numbers or their possible time of arrival."
"Nothing." {n}The captain replies dryly and succinctly.{/n} "I don't know their numbers or their possible time of arrival."

languages.text: «Nada». {n}El capitán responde directamente, con sequedad.{/n} «No sé ni su cantidad ni para cuándo se estima su llegada».
languages.original_text: "Nothing." {n}The captain replies dryly and succinctly.{/n} "I don't know their numbers or their possible time of arrival."

traits.locale_text: «Nada». {n}El capitán responde directamente, con sequedad.{/n} «No sé ni su cantidad ni para cuándo se estima su llegada».

languages.text: “没什么。”{n}上尉给出的回答冷淡而简明。{/n}“人数和大致到达时间，我都不清楚。”
languages.original_text: "Nothing." {n}The captain replies dryly and succinctly.{/n} "I don't know their numbers or their possible time of arrival."

traits.locale_text: “没什么。”{n}上尉给出的回答冷淡而简明。{/n}“人数和大致到达时间，我都不清楚。”

languages.text: « Rien. » {n}La réponse du capitaine est aussi sèche que succincte.{/n} « J'ignore tout de leurs effectifs et de la date à laquelle elles étaient censées arriver. »
languages.original_text: "Nothing." {n}The captain replies dryly and succinctly.{/n} "I don't know their numbers or their possible time of arrival."

traits.locale_text: « Rien. » {n}La réponse du capitaine est aussi sèche que succincte.{/n} « J'ignore tout de leurs effectifs et de la date à laquelle elles étaient censées arriver. »

languages.text: "Hiçbir şey." {n}Yüzbaşı, kuru ve öz bir şekilde cevap veriyor.{/n} "Sayılarını veya olası varış zamanlarını bilmiyorum."
languages.original_text: "Nothing." {n}The captain replies dryly and succinctly.{/n} "I don't know their numbers or their possible time of arrival."

traits.locale_text: "Hiçbir şey." {n}Yüzbaşı, kuru ve öz bir şekilde cevap veriyor.{/n} "Sayılarını veya olası varış zamanlarını bilmiyorum."

languages.text: "Nichts." {n}Die Antwort des Captains ist kurz und trocken.{/n} "Ich kenne weder ihre Zahl, noch ihre mögliche Ankunftszeit."
languages.original_text: "Nothing." {n}The captain replies dryly and succinctly.{/n} "I don't know their numbers or their possible time of arrival."

traits.locale_text: "Nichts." Die Antwort des Captains ist kurz und trocken.{/n} "Ich kenne weder ihre Zahl, noch ihre mögliche Ankunftszeit."

languages.text: 「何でもない」{n}艦長は簡潔に答えた。{/n}「彼らの人数や到着予定時刻はわからない」
languages.original_text: "Nothing." {n}The captain replies dryly and succinctly.{/n} "I don't know their numbers or their possible time of arrival."

traits.locale_text: 「何でもない」{n}艦長は簡潔に答えた。{/n}「彼らの人数や到着予定時刻はわからない」
